ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot reacting to a flying saucer, starting with a surprised, upward-looking posture and ending with arms outstretched as if reaching for the object.  The sequence uses both arms and includes changes in joint angles and wrist positions to create a dynamic and expressive movement. Frame 1: Both arms start in a neutral position, slightly raised in surprise. Frame 2: The left arm moves slightly outward and upward, while the right arm begins to extend outward and forward. Frame 3: Both arms continue to extend outward in a reaching motion, palms open. Frame 4: Both arms are fully extended, palms up, in a gesture of awe or wonder.

frames.beat: arms rise in surprise, looking up
arms begin to extend outward and upward
both arms reach further, palms open
arms fully extended in awe, reaching for the sky
